reasoning: Following the Red Team critique, the bias has been reversed to BEARISH. The 15m chart exhibits a rising wedge with clear bearish volume divergence, signaling buyer exhaustion. On the 1h timeframe, the price is struggling to maintain momentum at the POC (69949.67) after a sharp rejection from the VAH (74k) area, suggesting this is a bearish retest of a breakdown level. The lack of buying delta at this high-volume node indicates distribution. We anticipate a liquidity sweep targeting the equal lows and the VAL near 67k-68k. TP is set at 68250 (3.39% move) with an R:R of 1.59.
reasoning_zh: 根据红队评估，研判转向看跌。15分钟图显示上升楔形伴随明显的成交量背离，暗示多头动能枯竭。1小时图确认价格在从VAH（74k）区域大幅回落后，目前在POC（69949.67）附近的震荡属于弱势回测。高位成交密集区缺乏主动买盘支撑，显示派发迹象。预计市场将向下扫荡68.5k下方的等低点流动性并回踩VAL（67k）附近。止盈设在68250（预期跌幅3.39%），盈亏比为1.59。
